title: pseudocarpidium ilicifolium
intro: Pseudocarpidium ilicifolium, also known as the Philippine or Philippine bitter herb, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pseudocarpidium ilicifolium include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Pseudocarpidium ilicifolium include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
